title: New Materials Remastered
description: A mod that adds various new materials and tools!
body:
New Materials Remastered!

A mod which adds various new materials and items like uranium and titanium!

There is also Poison 3 potions!

Currently as of Alpha 1.2.0 we have -

  - Uranium Armour and Tools
  - Ore generation for titanium and uranium
- Titanium Sword and pickaxe

 

This is a remake of New Materials TU!
[Link here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/new-materials-tu)

 

- Mod Distribution -
I don't really care as long as you give credit and only post on platforms i haven't. Same with modpacks but its okay to post on curseforge or modrinth.


[Curseforge Link](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/new-materials-reborn)
